title: Bus Stop
writer: George Axelrod, William Inge, Maurice Griffe
actors: Marilyn Monroe, Don Murray, Arthur O'Connell
plot: A naive but stubborn cowboy falls in love with a saloon singer and tries to take her away against her will to get married and live on his ranch in Montana.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 1 win & 9 nominations total
